summary: Senator Lindsey Graham’s passing makes some of US President Donald Trump’s legislative agenda, particularly a reconciliation 3.0 package, harder. This episode of Bloomberg Intelligence’s Votes & Verdicts podcast centers on the implications of Graham’s death and the outlook of Apple’s suit accusing OpenAI of stealing trade secrets. title: Why India’s Rupee Recovery Has Petered Out
title_cn: 为什么印度卢比的复苏已经停止
summary: Geopolitical tensions, higher crude prices and a stronger dollar have returned.

title: France Gains From Talent Flows as Brand USA Slides for International Students

summary: Europe’s benefitting from the US’ weakening grip on international students, but it will need reform and investments to change things longer term.

summary: The silky cubes are flying off the shelves, highlighting the appeal of traditional foods in increasingly volatile times.

summary: Source: Bloomberg, 6:48

title: Chip Stocks Poised for Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片股有望进入人工智能熊市：市场结束
summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace on Friday, driving the group that has led this year’s stock rally toward a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.

title: Gold Heads for Second Weekly Drop as War Raises Fed Hike Fears
title_cn: 战争加剧美联储加息担忧，金价将连续第二周下跌
summary: Gold was on track for the biggest weekly loss since early June as renewed hostilities in the Middle East raised concerns that higher interest rates will be needed to contain war-driven inflation.

title: Anglo Has Chosen a Preferred Bidder for De Beers, Botswana Says
title_cn: 博茨瓦纳称，英美资源集团已选择戴比尔斯的首选竞购者
summary: Anglo American Plc has chosen a preferred bidder for its sale of De Beers, a Botswanan cabinet minister said.

title: BASF Seeks Banks to Lead IPO of €20 Billion Agrichemical Unit
title_cn: 巴斯夫寻求银行牵头 200 亿欧元农化部门的首次公开募股
summary: BASF SE has invited banks to pitch for roles on an initial public offering of its agrichemical division in Frankfurt, in what could be one of the largest offerings the bourse has seen in recent years.

title: US Stocks Plunge as Concerns of ‘DeepSeek 2.0’ Hit Chipmakers
title_cn: 由于“DeepSeek 2.0”的担忧打击芯片制造商，美国股市暴跌
summary: US stocks plunged on Friday as the selloff in semiconductor names gathered steam following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.

title: Hyperscalers Drag Down Bond Gauges Across Global Markets
title_cn: 超大规模企业拉低了全球市场的债券指标
summary: The bonds sold by hyperscalers to fuel their artificial intelligence ambitions have become a drag on investor portfolios from London to Tokyo.

title: Neglected Quant Safety Trade Makes a Comeback as AI Risks Rise
title_cn: 随着人工智能风险上升，被忽视的量化安全交易卷土重来
summary: As worries build around the artificial intelligence trade, investors are starting to seek shelter in a more pedestrian corner of the stock market: companies with sturdy finances.

title: IBM’s Warning Is a ‘Hammer’ Slamming Down on Tech’s AI Outsiders
title_cn: IBM 的警告是对科技界人工智能局外人的“重锤”
summary: International Business Machines Corp.’s warning this week that its sales are falling well short of expectations highlights a growing divide between artificial intelligence winners and everyone else in the tech universe.

title: Apple Tops Nvidia as World’s Largest Company Amid Tech Rotation
title_cn: 在技​​术轮换中苹果超越英伟达成为全球最大公司
summary: Apple Inc. is again the biggest company in the world after wresting the title from Nvidia Corp., which has held it since May 2025.

title: Chips Stocks Tumble Into Bear Market as 105% AI Rally Fizzles
title_cn: 105%人工智能涨势失败，芯片股跌入熊市
summary: A closely-watched index of semiconductor stocks has fallen into a bear market, unwinding a chunk of the blistering memory-led rally that saw the gauge more than double in just three months.

title: Hedge Fund Symmetry Gets Regulatory Nod to Operate in Dubai
title_cn: 对冲基金对称获得监管机构批准在迪拜运营
summary: Symmetry Investments has received the regulatory approval to operate in Dubai, joining hedge fund peers who’re continuing to expand in the emirate despite the regional conflict.

title: Bank of Italy Raises Growth Forecast in Another Boon for Meloni
title_cn: 意大利央行上调增长预测，为 Meloni 带来又一利好
summary: The Bank of Italy raised its outlook for the country’s economy, judging that a positive start to the year will outweigh fallout that followed from the Iran war.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 17
title_cn: 7 月 17 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil was heading for its biggest weekly advance since April on mounting signs that the Middle East conflict is escalating, threatening flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Apple Upgraded to Buy by HSBC on Agentic AI, Hardware Pipeline
title_cn: 苹果在 Agentic AI 和硬件管道方面被汇丰银行上调至买入评级
summary: Apple Inc. was upgraded to buy at HSBC Holdings Plc on Friday, in the latest reflection of how Wall Street is increasingly positive on the iPhone maker’s position in a market where many trades related to artificial intelligence have been faltering.

title: Coronation Trims TSMC, SK Hynix on AI Hype, Boosts India Stocks
title_cn: 加冕因人工智能炒作而削减台积电和SK海力士，提振印度股市
summary: Coronation Asset Management Ltd., which oversees $47 billion, has trimmed its exposure to chipmakers and increased its allocation to India, as expectations for artificial intelligence stocks have risen to levels that are nearly impossible to beat.

title: Oil Market Can’t Live Without Hormuz Barrels for Long
title_cn: 石油市场不能长期没有霍尔木兹桶
summary: Flows through the critical waterway haven’t fully stopped, but signs of stress in the market are mounting.

title: Innolight Gets Approval for Up to $8 Billion Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: 旭创科技获准在香港上市，融资金额高达 80 亿美元
summary: Zhongji Innolight Co. received approval from China’s securities regulator and the Hong Kong stock exchange for what is likely to be one of the city’s biggest listings in years.

title: Reliance Founders Lift Stake by Most Since 2019 as Stock Slumps
title_cn: 随着股价暴跌，Reliance 创始人自 2019 年以来减持了大部分股份
summary: Reliance Industries Ltd. founders, led by billionaire Mukesh Ambani, raised stake in the Indian oil-to-telecom conglomerate by the most in nearly seven years following the stock’s prolonged slump in the wake of the US-Iran war.

title: Lula’s Panda-Bond Push Tests China’s Appeal for Brazil’s Firms
title_cn: 卢拉推动熊猫债考验中国对巴西企业的吸引力
summary: Brazil has big ambitions for its plan to enter China’s onshore bond market — if only corporate Brazil follows along.

title: Amundi Says Oil, Gas Crucial to EU’s Clean-Energy Transition
title_cn: Amundi表示石油、天然气对欧盟清洁能源转型至关重要
summary: Amundi SA wants the European Union to free asset managers to add oil and gas exposures to a new fund category intended to support the transition to a lower-carbon economy.

title: Bethesda Announces New ‘Fallout’ Roadmap Following Xbox Reset
title_cn: 贝塞斯达 (Bethesda) 宣布 Xbox 重置后新的《辐射》路线图
summary: The studio confirmed development on ‘Fallout 5’ and a new game with Obsidian Entertainment

title: Netflix Shares Tumble Most in Four Years on Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 股价因增长放缓而跌幅四年来最大
summary: Netflix Inc. shares fell the most in more than four years after the company forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, contributing to investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future.

title: Spain, Portugal Data Center Boom Faces Electrical Grid Bottlenecks
title_cn: 西班牙、葡萄牙数据中心繁荣面临电网瓶颈
summary: Spain and Portugal are experiencing a significant data center boom, but constraints around electrical grid capacity, network access and permitting are slowing the pace of new project development.

title: China’s Moonshot Unveils AI Model That Narrows Gap With US Firms
title_cn: 中国的登月计划推出人工智能模型，缩小与美国公司的差距
summary: Chinese AI pioneer Moonshot unveiled a new model that it claims performs on par with some of the top-tier platforms from OpenAI and Anthropic PBC, the latest sign that the Asian country’s artificial intelligence labs are closing a technology gap with the US.

title: AI-Based Businesses Are Diversifying and Rejecting AI Model Monogamy
title_cn: 基于人工智能的企业正在多元化并拒绝人工智能模式一夫一妻制
summary: Businesses that depend on any one AI model are vulnerable, so they’re adapting

title: China Can Still Win the AI Race With Inferior Technology
title_cn: 中国仍能以劣势技术赢得人工智能竞赛
summary: It’s about economics, power as well as engineering.

title: Xi Seeks Global AI Sway as Surging Chinese Models Spur Alarm
title_cn: 中国模式崛起敲响警钟，习近平谋求全球人工智能影响力
summary: President Xi Jinping used the rise of China’s AI models to stake his claim on shaping the technology’s global rules, even as their growing power stirs security concerns in Washington and Beijing alike.

title: China to Impose Consumption Tax on Solar and Lithium Batteries
title_cn: 中国将对太阳能和锂电池征收消费税
summary: China plans to end a decade-long consumption tax exemption for solar and lithium-ion batteries, marking a policy shift as Beijing seeks to rein in intense competition in the industries central to the clean-energy transition.

title: The Odyssey: Christopher Nolan Movie Stars Zendaya, Matt Damon in Homer Epic
title_cn: 奥德赛：克里斯托弗·诺兰电影明星赞达亚、马特·达蒙在荷马史诗中
summary: The Odyssey hits theaters on Friday and is expected to bring in roughly $100 million in its opening weekend.

title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Enters Correction on Fears AI Rally Overdone
title_cn: 日本日经 225 指数因担心人工智能反弹过度而进入修正
summary: Japan’s Nikkei 225 Stock Average tumbled to close more than 10% below its June 25 peak, a move termed as a technical correction, amid concerns the global artificial intelligence rally may be stretched.

title: Chipmaker Kioxia’s Market Value Halves From Peak on AI Selloff
title_cn: 芯片制造商 Kioxia 的市值因人工智能抛售而从峰值减半
summary: Japanese memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp.’s market capitalization halved in just a month since becoming the nation’s most valuable company, on growing concerns the AI-driven rally in the sector has gone too far.

title: SoftBank Plans New ¥60 Billion Bond After Retail, Overseas Deals
title_cn: 软银计划在零售和海外交易后发行 600 亿日元新债券
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to sell about ¥60 billion ($369 million) of notes to institutional investors in Japan this month after domestic retail and foreign-currency bond offerings earlier this year.

title: Z.AI Set to Be First China AI Firm With $1 Billion Annual Sales
title_cn: Z.AI 将成为中国首家年销售额突破 10 亿美元的人工智能公司
summary: Z.AI is on track for annual recurring revenue of $1 billion, a significant ramp-up for an enterprise-focused AI startup trying to fend off a host of rivals in an intensely competitive Chinese field.

title: Xi Promises AI for All in Debut at China’s Top Tech Summit
title_cn: 习近平在中国顶级科技峰会上首次承诺“全民人工智能”
summary: President Xi Jinping hailed China’s progress in developing low-cost artificial intelligence, pressing his personal imprint on the country’s rapidly expanding global influence to call for a more open technological order.

title: CXMT’s Marquee IPO 212 Times Oversubscribed by Retail Investors
title_cn: 长鑫存储大型IPO获散户投资者超额认购212倍
summary: The marquee listing of CXMT Corp. ignited a rush among retail investors as China’s homegrown memory giant opened books for an initial public offering to raise $9.8 billion, the second-largest in the nation’s history.

title: Xi Pushes Human Oversight of AI as China Expands Global Outreach
title_cn: 随着中国扩大全球影响力，习近平推动对人工智能的人类监督

title: Mitsubishi Electric Eyes Power-Chip Merger With Rohm and Toshiba
title_cn: 三菱电眼功率芯片与罗姆和东芝合并
summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corp. seeks to reach a deal by September with rivals Toshiba Corp. and Rohm Co. to combine their power semiconductor operations.

title: Tata Group Resorts to Older Tech to Launch Its Chip Foray
title_cn: 塔塔集团借助旧技术发起芯片进军
summary: Tata Electronics Pvt. is preparing to make India’s first semiconductor wafers on far older technology than it originally expected, underscoring the challenges the country faces in trying to build a domestic chip industry from scratch.

title: DeepSeek Champions China’s Bid to Flood the World With Cheap AI
title_cn: DeepSeek 支持中国用廉价人工智能淹没世界
summary: On a video conference call from Hangzhou earlier this year, one of China’s hottest startups held a four-hour pitch meeting with potential venture investors that was unusual by almost any measure. Only two representatives per institution were allowed. The majority of those present were getting a glimpse of the company’s leader for the very first time.

title: Tech Stocks Drag S&P 500 Lower as TSMC Results Spur AI Concerns
title_cn: 台积电业绩引发人工智能担忧，科技股拖累标普 500 指数走低
summary: Technology stocks pushed major US stock indexes lower on Thursday as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results spurred worries around artificial-intelligence spending.

title: China Signals US Restored Hong Kong Privileges Trump Had Revoked
title_cn: 中国暗示美国恢复特朗普取消的香港特权
summary: China suggested that the US has restored privileges for Hong Kong that President Donald Trump revoked in 2020, in his first term, describing the move as an important step toward improving bilateral ties.

title: Democratic Lawmakers Urge ‘Impartial’ Review of Fox-Roku Deal
title_cn: 民主党议员敦促对 Fox-Roku 交易进行“公正”审查
summary: A group of Democratic members of Congress led by Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren raised alarm bells about Fox Corp.’s pending $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. in a letter sent to the Justice Department on Thursday.

title: Yale Leader Blasted by Faculty for Negotiating With Trump’s DOJ
title_cn: 耶鲁大学领导人因与特朗普司法部谈判而遭到教职人员的猛烈抨击
summary: Yale President Maurie McInnis has largely avoided the turmoil that has engulfed her counterparts at Columbia, Harvard and Brown universities and toppled multiple university leaders.

title: EU Unveils Banking Revamp to Answer Trump’s Deregulation
title_cn: 欧盟推出银行业改革以回应特朗普的放松管制
summary: The European Union unveiled a sweeping package to tackle inefficiencies, barriers and national biases that have dogged its banks for decades, seizing on concerns about growth and competitiveness to take on contentious issues like deposit insurance and the free flow of capital across the bloc’s borders.

title: Mamdani Rejects Pay Hike to $305,800 Approved by Lawmakers
title_cn: Mamdani 拒绝立法者批准的加薪至 305,800 美元
summary: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’ll forgo a pay increase approved by City Council members as they voted to give themselves their first salary bump in a decade.

title: UN Sanctions Congo Rebels as Trump-Backed Peace Deal Languishes
title_cn: 特朗普支持的和平协议陷入困境，联合国制裁刚果叛军
summary: The United Nations sanctioned six rebel leaders and two armed groups in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, piling pressure on actors in a 30-year conflict that shows little sign of ending.

title: Global Powers Ramp Up Efforts to Avert Another Massacre in Sudan
title_cn: 全球大国加大努力避免苏丹再次发生大屠杀
summary: The Group of Seven nations called on rebel forces in Sudan to halt any actions that may lead to atrocities in the city of El-Obeid, adding to growing international pressure to avoid another massacre in the North African nation.

title: Why Andy Burnham is Set to Start Disappointing People as He Becomes PM
title_cn: 为什么安迪·伯纳姆成为总理后将开始让人们失望
summary: After a decade outside national politics, Andy Burnham's survival depends on changing Westminster before it can change him.

title: Burnham Says He’ll Be a Pro-Business PM in London Speech
title_cn: 伯纳姆在伦敦演讲中表示他将成为亲商界首相
summary: Andy Burnham said he’ll be a pro-business prime minister, in his first speech since formally winning an uncontested race to lead the governing Labour Party.

title: Burnham Faces Warning Iran Could Overshadow Ascent to UK PM
title_cn: 伯纳姆面临警告，伊朗可能会影响英国首相的晋升
summary: Incoming UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham will be given assessments by British officials warning the US-Iran war could escalate during his first week in office, potentially complicating plans for his early days in power.

title: Trump’s Election Claims Overshadow GOP Message on Costs
title_cn: 特朗普的选举主张掩盖了共和党关于成本的信息
summary: Voters, and many Republicans on the ballot, want to focus on other topics.

title: Ghana Mining Law Revamp Could Complicate Gold Fields’s Lease Renewal
title_cn: 加纳采矿法改革可能会使金矿的租约续签变得复杂
summary: Ghana is preparing its first sweeping overhaul of mining legislation in two decades, slashing the length of time companies can operate mines in Africa’s largest gold producer without renewing their rights.

title: Iran Attacks Kuwait Desalination and Power Plants as Hostilities Worsen
title_cn: 敌对行动加剧，伊朗袭击科威特海水淡化厂和发电厂
summary: Iran attacked Kuwaiti water and power plants in counterstrikes against the US, underscoring how the conflict in the Middle East is worsening and threats on civilian sites are increasingly under threat.

title: US, Iran Step Up Attacks as Fears Grow of Return to Full War
title_cn: 由于担心全面战争加剧，美国和伊朗加强袭击
summary: The US and Iran intensified their attacks beyond military targets during a sixth straight day of hostilities, increasing fears of a return to full war with no agreement reached over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Bolsonaro’s Ties to Trump Are a Gift to Lula as Brazil’s Election Nears
title_cn: 随着巴西大选临近，博尔索纳罗与特朗普的关系是送给卢拉的礼物
summary: US tariffs hand Lula an election-year gift against his opponent, Flávio Bolsonaro.

title: Trump Accuses China of Election Meddling, Threatening Truce
title_cn: 特朗普指责中国干预选举并威胁停战
summary: President Donald Trump accused China of interfering with US elections in 2020, threatening to upend ties with the world’s second-biggest economy as he focuses on securing a victory in the midterms in November.

title: Russian Police Detain Pro-Kremlin Blogger Who Turned On Putin
title_cn: 俄罗斯警方拘留了攻击普京的亲克里姆林宫博主
summary: A former pro-Kremlin blogger who turned against President Vladimir Putin was detained on charges of spreading “fake news” about Russia’s armed forces.

title: Hong Kong Fast-Tracks Law for Five-Minute Border Trips to China
title_cn: 香港五分钟过境快速通道法
summary: Hong Kong lawmakers passed a bill enabling one-stop immigration checks at a new border crossing with Shenzhen, the city’s latest step to deepen links with mainland China.

title: China Daily’s Video of Monkey in Filipino Costume Draws Philippines’ Rebuke
title_cn: 中国日报发布菲律宾服装猴子视频引菲律宾斥责
summary: China Daily’s AI-generated video of a monkey wearing Filipino national costume has triggered a diplomatic protest from the Philippines, raising tensions days before Beijing’s top diplomat joins a regional meeting in Manila.

title: Trump to Cut US Stays for China Journalists, Risking Retaliation
title_cn: 特朗普将减少中国记者在美国的停留时间，冒着遭到报复的风险
summary: The Trump administration said it would shorten the duration of visas for foreign journalists — raising concern about a new round of tit-for-tat restrictions with China.
